hypothesis: Add zero-sale streak feature (consecutive days of zero sales before current day) and item release date (days since first non-zero sale). These features help the model distinguish items that are temporarily out of stock vs. items that are newly released vs. items with genuinely low demand. They are known to be highly predictive in M5. All other settings match best run (exp_0044, WRMSSE=0.94391) with long lags.
